ksa_text: Skill in managing data handling processes, applying data handling tools and techniques, aggregating data, and managing data throughout its lifecycle.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-S-005 (Data Quality/Skill) scores 0.460 composite (highest: O*NET at 0.460) and is edge_case for the Domain Data Product Owner role. Domain prior: edge. Core signal hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority is appropriate for manager-level Domain Data Product Owner.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with edge_case scope, O*NET signal (0.460), and Data Quality handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Data Quality appears in 50-80% of Domain Data Product Owner job postings. KSA content aligns with hiring criteria at manager level.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Data Quality at composite 0.460 is market-validated for Domain Data Product Owner. Final decision: include.
